summary: All 7 critical bugs have been VERIFIED as fixed. Login redirect, route redirects, navbar updates, EntitySport V2 API integration, and profile dropdown all working correctly. 15/15 backend tests passed, all frontend pages verified.

issue_1_login_redirect.description: Login with admin@free11.com / Admin@123 succeeds and redirects to /match-centre
issue_1_login_redirect.evidence: Playwright test confirmed redirect to /match-centre after login

issue_2_contests_redirect.evidence: Playwright test confirmed /contests and /cricket both redirect to /match-centre

issue_3_cards_page_layout.description: Cards page header does not overlap with card content, Navbar is present
issue_3_cards_page_layout.evidence: Screenshot shows proper spacing with sticky header and Navbar at top

issue_4_dashboard_entitysport.description: Dashboard fetches live match data from EntitySport V2 API (ENG vs NZ, NOT old CSK vs MI mock data)
issue_4_dashboard_entitysport.evidence: Dashboard shows real match: ENG vs NZ *55/0 (6.1 ov) from EntitySport API

issue_5_navbar_links.description: Navbar has Matches, Cards, Wallet, Invite, Profile (no old /contests or /cricket links)
issue_5_navbar_links.evidence: Navbar HTML verified - contains V2 routes, no legacy routes

issue_6_match_centre_page.description: /match-centre page loads with Navbar and tabs (Live/Upcoming/Completed)
issue_6_match_centre_page.evidence: Match Centre shows real EntitySport matches with all 3 tabs working

issue_7_profile_dropdown.description: Profile dropdown has Profile, Help & Support, and admin links (Beta Dashboard, Control Panel) for admin users
issue_7_profile_dropdown.evidence: Screenshot shows dropdown with all required menu items

auth_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login: 200 OK - Returns token and user data

entitysport_v2_endpoints.GET /api/v2/es/matches?status=3: 200 OK - Returns LIVE matches from EntitySport (ENG vs NZ)

v2_engine_endpoints.GET /api/v2/referral/stats: 200 OK - Returns referral code and stats

elements: Live Cricket section with ENG vs NZ

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 critical bugs verified as fixed: (1) Login redirects to /match-centre, (2) /contests and /cricket redirect to /match-centre, (3) Cards page has Navbar with proper header spacing, (4) Dashboard uses EntitySport V2 API showing real ENG vs NZ match, (5) Navbar has V2 routes only, (6) Match Centre has Navbar with tabs, (7) Profile dropdown has admin links. EntitySport API returns real live cricket data.

mocked_apis_note.entitysport: NOT MOCKED - Real API data from rest.entitysport.com/v2
